reviews.review_title: the main content of my channel
reviews.review_description:
I love this game, it has a lot of fun maps to play on but here’s the thing, rule breakers, there’s constant chaos in Meet up lobbies where either little kids or teenagers say racial slurs and stuff, when I cut it out it removes almost 90 percent of my video, either leaving me with 20-10 mins of content, please make mods observe lobbies.

-@Raredragon80 on YouTube.

This is one of my most favorite games! Firstly, the gameplay is amazing and sometimes you would get a great moment where someone says something at the wrong time and gets slimed. Lastly, there hasn’t been any major glitches recently. There used to be a whole lot but there isn’t any more, but recently most of my stuff disappeared or glitched out where I can’t equip it anymore. It’s nothing big where I can’t move or anything, but most of my items were limited and can’t be obtained right now, like the Halloween Candy Bucket or Christmas Candy Cane.

The game is pure negligence bc i was playing normally everyone saying racist things and slurs and i was the only one getting banned obly bc i said “ imma kill that bean! “  bc i was getting ragebaited by the bean
YOU MODERATORS ARE SLOP
DO SOMETHING WITH YOUR GAME,
your game is amazing but THE DEVELOPERS DO NOTHING YOU USELESS BAN BRO THE BAN IS USELESS U ONLY MESS UP 
IF THIS IS SOME KINDA JOKE? J DON’T LIKE IT PLEASE UNBAN ME MY USERNAME IS “DANIEL” D-A-N-I-E-L IF YOU MESS UP AND BAN ME EVEN MORE IM UNSTALLING IT AND REPORTING EVERYTHING OF THIS 
GETTING BANNED EVERYTIME IS BORING STOP WITH IT YOU SLOP

So like it was last week, at night, I decided to go to sleep, and suddenly a couple days later. BAM!!! I got banned FOR. A. YEAR!! I quote on the quote "Spammed the N word," but I did nothing, I was offline for a couple of days, and you decided to do that??? Horrible!
 I maybe got hacked or not. But I CAN'T appeal it because I can't use Discord.
Again, I maybe got hacked. 
Like red from the among us show always says: "No biggie" I'll be fine! It's a bit ironic the fact that I got banned for a year for nothing or got hacked. Or maybe it was my little brother? He's never racist, just very annoying! 

But the good side is that this game was GREAT. Peak monsters, peak maps, and peak flashlights. This game is great. Just wish I was unbanned🙁

I gave Og FMH 4 stars because for the most part it's really fun they have a lot of maps, 15 to be exact, all of these maps are fun but in my opinion the funnest one is Meetup, I was going to give a 5 star review but I didn't because all of the N word slurs and the cursing, you can hear slurs in every lobby, but besides that thr game is fun and the moderators are nice!

reviews.review_title: This is a apology to  owner
reviews.review_description: I’m truly sorry for my behavior I would kindly ask to be unbanned and I apologize, I will never break these rules again I am sorry. Also I know a lot of little kids that say the n word and one time I got in contact with this 11 year old just to know if he got banned for saying the n word and guess what happened a month later, nothing not a ban and, I say that the moderation should be better because he still isn’t banned, so please I think that people like that should prioritized and monitored very closely, just please appeal the ban I’m begging.

Ogfmh is such a great game and I don’t say this for glazed but when I was getting bullied and felt like I shouldn’t belong here I was going through TikTok and saw this game and decided to play then it made me happy and had so many good memories with the community. Thank you ogfmh for always being there.

MAKE THE MODERATION MORE STRICT, I uninstalled in the first hour of playing because I LOST COUNT of how many times I heard the 
N-word; the games are fun but the community is a HUGE PROBLEM! I’m sure so many other players have quit for this exact reason
 (translation: bad moderation equals less players which equals less money)
So with that I have one more thing to say to the dev(s).
 
FIX

YOUR


DARN



M O D E R A T I O N

I actually have 3 ideas, but I’ll just sort them in order.


First, make a map that’s similar to The run map, but the walls are bright yellow with some patterns on it. Dark brown doors across the walls. Making this environment like a motel/hotel. And the way for the monkes to move, is through like a Very thin place, like the cave map. And the monster should be fast, with two creepy dolls. Like the shining movie.


Second, the map is like an endless area of office furniture, with computers and desks. With foggy green haze, making it hard for the players to see through, or to see the monster. And the monster is suppose look like nightmare William Afton.

Third, the player is suppose to spawn at the start of a big hill, the entire area is supposed to be dark, except when the player uses their flashlight  and when the player goes onto the hill, it’s suppose to be an bandoned house, and when you go inside, there will be a big area. Dark area, dead monkeys, and in the living room is a tv with static playing. And  there is a down stairs. And the down stairs are 8 separate rooms of dead monkeys. And behind the house is a pumpkin patch, there is a creature there, that creature is The pumpkin rabbit. And the creature for the house is his wife, I forgot the name of it,. (This map is based on the analog horror btw)



So please developer please makes these maps, or one of them, if you don’t that’s okay, I was just spreading my own ideas to you, and whatever building team you have. I really do love this game, an I hope you have a great day

reviews.review_description: Idk why there is that when you join the game and your wifi is expected to be online, there is a red screen filled with text "failed to connect to tokens whatever".
